messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?
It's a team effort, it's a team effort.
Welcome, Team Effort! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under: Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?
Sorry to hear that. It seems there's no relevant information in our knowledge base for a "role issue". Can you please describe what exactly is happening with your role issue?
I understand how frustrating that must be. Let me confirm - you're facing an electricity issue, is that correct?
I've registered your grievance. The Electricity department will be notified and will resolve this within 3 to 5 working days. You can also call their helpline at 191 for assistance.
